# JDK-8317742: ISO Standard Date Format implementation consistency on DateTimeFormatter and String.format

> **PR**: [16033](https://github.com/openjdk/jdk/pull/16033) | **Author**: wenshao | **Status**: merged

---

## Summary

j.u.Formatter now prints "%tF" (iso standard date) and the result is incorrect when processing year < 0 or year > 9999
